CCNoTags.^description: This CodeCommit repository has no tags. Tagging repositories enables cost allocation, access control via tag-based IAM policies, and better resource organization across your CI/CD infrastructure.

CCNoApprovalRules.^description: No approval rule templates are defined in this region. Approval rule templates enforce peer review requirements on pull requests, preventing direct merges to protected branches without the required number of approvals.
CCNoApprovalRules.shortDesc: Define approval rule templates for CodeCommit

CCNoDefaultBranch.^description: This CodeCommit repository has no default branch configured. A default branch is required for pull request workflows and is used as the base branch for merge operations. This may indicate an empty or misconfigured repository.
CCNoDefaultBranch.shortDesc: Set a default branch for CodeCommit repository
